violations.text: Thermometer is lacking in the small milk refrigerator on the service line. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
The dishwasher was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for to have a Rhode Island Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not being properly sanitized. Per PIC, establishment was using a spray bottle with sanitizer to sanitize food-contact surfaces. Establishment is to send food-contact surfaces of utensils and equipment back to mother kitchen to be properly washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The dish washing machine located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The dishwasher is in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Corrective action - establishment must complete repair to dishwasher so it can resume working order. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
The lights above the serving unit are out. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023
